reviews.review_text: Not a bad place to stop for a night or 2
Clean and tidy.  Power and water available.
Great caretakers! Best thing about the place.
Sign at entrance from Tank St, it looks all good but no car camping.
Best place to stay at Gladstone, nice and clean amenities 👍👍
A great place tp drop in for a quiet relaxing stay. The caretaker was very helpful to our litany of questions. Thank you!
4 great days city lights at night to enjoy. The volunteers do a great job thanks to all.  A good coffee shop and a great  hairdresser across the road . A great location to explore from thanks
Very friendly staff,plenty of room
Extremely helpful staff. Arrived late and the caretaker was there to greet and assist. Great value
Very easy going,not much noise,,toilets are reasonable, say no more

Nice spot  dog friendly  plenty of room
Clean facilities

One star because zero not available. I pre-booked a week earlier and told to just rock up on the day. We were not warned it was rodeo night, almost no sites available (early afternoon) and only on sloping ground, showers would all be used by rodeo people and most likely cold, we would not be able to use or van (small RV) to attend the function we were there for and return later in the evening. The caretaker is a lovely man and had been left with an impossible situation by someone else. He directed us to a nice place for a spot of stealth camping.

Care takers Ken and June will make sure your visit it fabulous and secure. The perfect location to leave your caravan and tow vehicle to go to heron island! $30 a night for power and water is a bargin and $5 a night whilst on heron. The facilities at showground are very clean, dump point is only up
The road . Love , love  , love the location! Close to the bowling club   , pie world, coffee shop , hairdresser and beautician out the front.
Not many level sites toilets old and the smell reminds me of a stock yard

Great location, and fantastic caretaker that's helpful and knowledgeable.
Thank you 😊

Caretakers were lovely and toilets and showers clean. Very nice coffee and breakfast spot across the road and a fresh seafood van stops out the front certain days. Seafood was great. Not much shade or green grass and grounds are run down but ok as a stop for a day or two. Dog friendly.

Nice and friendly Caretaker, "we're always open!" :)
He let us choose our grass site: with power & water. Close to amenities (hot shower), for $30 a night.
A good central location handy to most facilities. Stay here anytime I visit Gladstone.
Great spot, lovely caretakers!

The rudest caretaker you could ever meet absolutely the worst caretaker we have come across throughout all of Australia for 30 $ we decided to go else where and was the best decision- kindness is free he should think about that
Quiet spot close to town and shopping center
Great site for $30 close to town, water and power if you need it, old toilet blocks usable but not pretty. Heaps of sites many drive through ones for longer rigs although many are on sloping sites.
Good base, to get out and see Gladstone..

Do not expect 4 star camp site. Only basis grass powered sites available.
Amenities in low range of quality.
The caretakers are very pleasant to talk to and very helpful. Amenities are clean. It is close to town and is quiet at night.
If you have to stay in Gladstone it is convenient to the city centre, port and shopping centres. Level sites are a premium. Amenities could do with an update but very clean and functional.

Great location to park the caravan while exploring the area being close to Gladstone Central. Water and power hook-ups fairly easy but may need longer leads/hoses on some sites. We were squeezed in very close to other vans and not sure why. No dump point is a negative, plus be prepared to level up quite a bit. Two sets of toilet facilities and a separate unisex shower block.
my kids loved it .
Water and power hook up.$30:00 a night
Awesome place really friendly caretakers and so close to groceries and wards brewery a must visit even just for lunch but beers are amazing all within walking distance 😀
Close to shops, but no tents allowed.
Large sites, easy access, quiet , dated but clean toilets/showers. Centrally located in the city ,
Facilities are a bit old but functional. Sites slope.
Good clean place, just working There at the moment
Love booking in and listening to care takers bag out other travellers , all whilst sucking down cigarettes, another lot of caretakers that don’t caretake
Very disappointing, if you're in a swag don't bother, we were quite rudely told to leave.
Nice clean quiet area.

Left a text message on the Showground site phone number , asking about availability from 17/5/25 for a few nights due to Ute being serviced , received a message back to say we were all booked in , arrived at the office to find a lovely fill in caretaker as permanent caretaker was ill , paid by card (cash also fine) we chose our site after being told what area was more level , toilets /showers clean & tidy (nothing flash but that’s normal for Showground amenities) soap & paper towel to wash hands , $30 for power & water with amenities is pretty good , would definitely come back and stay again
Very reasonably priced. Sites very un level though. Clean but old amenities. Caretakers on site are very helpful and friendly. Loved the town.
Lovely caretakers, they do so much without the support of the local council. Wish them all the best in the future. No wonder council loose so many good people. Council need a good you know what
Liked it

We stayed here., great place, Amenities are clean, Caretaker is Friendly, open area, not too close to anyone, close to town, pool right next door to showgrounds, also a lot cheaper than Caravan Parks. I most certainly will be back here, when coming back to Gladstone Qld
Great little overnight stopping place clean toilets $30 for the night was very reasonable
No showers, has water and power more for self comtained traveller

This Show grounds in well situated to the centre of town which is helpful, toilets were clean, the site fairly flat depending on the spot you get. The cost was $30 per night powered sites. The only issue is that there's no dump point on site. Some cafes are over the road, water park next door and supermarket close by.

Nice place to rest up, power and water if you want it.  No dump point though.
$30 per night.

We couldn't fault this location for a few nights while we had a lovely time in Gladstone.
Leonie the caretaker was very down to earth, & friendly & it seemed nothing was a problem to her. She was happy to help, chat whatever.
Havoc you gorg boy (4 legged) such a cute soul.
Great amenities, great space to spread out, great location at top of grounds with view & good price for water and electricity. Lovely grass 🙌🙌
Would use again. Thank you
Good overnight stop if you are travelling power and water available shops in walking distance
Great spot to stay, ,with power and water $30 a night ,toilets and showers although very old.close to everything, feels safe,took car off and explored the area.great care taker.
Excellent
Lovely spot and  clean toilets etc.Good price.Highly recommend .
Plenty of room and close to shops etc. Very clean amenities.

Nice spot close to town
Very clean toilets
Plenty of room 4 big vans
For anybody travelling it seems to be a good central position in town. Woollies, post office, chemist n take away shops, all within a 5 minute walk.
Just arrived show is on this weekend but they let us stay. Big area. $30 per night. We paid for the week $210 p/w.

Great place to stay
Power and water
Heaps of room when we stayed
We felt safe a d secure while there

Die Dame,die uns empfangen hat, war sehr nett. Das war's aber auch schon. Mit Campingplatz hat das nichts zu tun. Es ist eine freie Fläche auf dem Gelände einer Kirmis. Es gibt zwar Toiletten und Duschen,diese sind auch sauber aber es gibt keine Ablagefläche,nur ein winziges Handwaschbecken mit kaltem Wasser und Duschen mit warmem Wasser Alles ist sehr veraltet. Am Eingang steht ein Schild,es wäre nichts frei, aber wir waren fast die Einzigen auf der riesigen Fläche. Online gibt es keine Informationen über den wahren Preis der Übernachtung,nur daß man in bar zahlen soll. Allerdings konnte ich dann doch mit Karte zahlen, 35$. Der Preis ist viel zu hoch für einen solchen Stellplatz und ohne Küche. Kein Wunder,daß so viele Leute illegal irgendwo campen.
Great free shower. Thanks Gladstone Show Ground.
Open for caravans although  not advertised $25 a night with power clean and quiet

Stayed here with campervan for 3 nights, welcomed by the lovely Nadine, (the very sympathetic manager of the grounds.) Right next to a watertap and a powerpoint, barely a minute walk to the bathrooms (which are kept nice and clean! and are locked to anyone who doesn't have the key, which always feels just a bit safer.) Spacious, green, clean, allround great place to set up camp 👍
Not opened but still advertised.

Always stay here when in Gladstone. Close to shops, pool, coffee shops etc.
Have heard that Council has closed now to all caravans. Is this correct.
Central,grass site ,great showers
Loved it. There are plenty of drive through sites. Clean amenities. Central

Wir sind im September dieses Jahres ungeplant auf diesem Campground gelandet, da wir aufgrund der langen Fahrzeit im Camper völlig vergassen, uns nach einer Bleibe für die erste Nacht zu kümmern. ;-) Der Campground wirkt optisch auf den ersten Blick nicht gerade einladen, bietet aber alles, was man für eine Nacht im Campervan benötigt. Wir können den Platz für eine Nacht guten Gewissens empfehlen, wenn man auf der Durchreise ist.
Great spot to explore from
Plenty of space ,quiet location near town centre .swimming pool  tennis courts next door

Great spot close to town, clean amenities.
Ok the negatives are: can't sleep in your car but you could sleep in a van ( like a ford transit for example)
No tents however you can sleep in a roof top tent or a trailer tent.
No sleeping in your boat!!
Now this seems very discriminative to me.
It appears the poor person that can only afford a tent or the back of car is not welcome here.
Just for the very few that can afford the luxury of a caravan, campervan, camper trailer or a roof top tent!!
We are lucky other showgrounds throughout Australia welcome us and are very accommodating and don't judge us for not having the money to afford a van.
Nice site,2 sets of showers/toilets. Grassed sites.Powered with water or not.
Fantastic location, good facilities, reasonable price. Highly recommended. Gladstone is beautiful
Great camping area. Reasonably priced. Relatively quiet. Felt safe. Would stay again.
Pleasant basic campsite close in town. Not too busy midweek
Okay place to stay
Awesome Gladstone show ground 🌻 with love and GBU always ♦️ Yay ❤️

A great campsite!
As a solo female traveller I felt very safe here.
The checkin was easy (text the number rather than call), the lady was so lovely and let me pick a spot as I didn't need power, good price, the toilets and showers were clean and it's a short walk or bike ride to Ward's brewery and the Club (great chicken parmi).
No tents allowed, but I have a rooftop tent so that was no issue.
Will definitely stay here again 😊
Showers are hot.
Had a great stay will be back

Great place to stay for a week.
the new caretaker Katie had just started that day and was wonderful. She is doing a great job. 👍😊

Interesting place! Some people allowed to stay permanent, like big buses from WA. But we were only allowed 7 days. Weird ! OK place. Not level area but big area. Bathrooms ok. 2 out of 5 showers works.
